title: CreativePack
description: The best Minecraft Creative Modpack for building!
body:
# 🧱 Creative Builder Pack

A simple but powerful modpack made for people, building in Creative Mode.
Inclueds building tools, performance, and visual quality mod!


<details>
<summary>🛠️ Included Mods</summary>

## 🧰 Building Mods

- WorldEdit
- Litematica
- Axiom
- Anti Creative Drift
- Accurate Block Placement Reborn

## 🏃‍➡️ Performance Mods
- Iris + Complementary Shaders
- Sodium
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Xaero’s Minimap + World Map
- Freecam, Zoomify
- Gamma Utils
## ⚙️ Libraries & Utilities

- Fabric API
- MaLiLib
- Architectury
- Cloth Config
- YACL
- Collective
- MidnightLib
- iChunUtil

</details>



# Perfect for:

- Creative building
- Map making
- Redstone testing
- World showcases

**Please give me your feedback [here](https://lostgpu.netlify.app/feedback).**
